official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound set_experience fixture.
Official binary source for progress, level, and total experience body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_experience packet id.

field_notes.experience_progress: Primitive progress fixture; does not prove player XP state.
field_notes.experience_level: Constructor third argument; official body writes this value before total experience.
field_notes.total_experience: Constructor second argument; official body writes this value after level.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_experience packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive progress/level/total fixture only; do not infer player XP state, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
